allow: Bash(python3 -m py_compile core/config.py services/llm_router.py tools/__init__.py agents/base_agent.py agents/coder_agent.py agents/debugger_agent.py routers/agent.py)

Bash(python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('/root/my_project/docker-compose.yml'\)\); a=d['services']['agent-service']; print\('YAML VALID ✔'\); print\('agent env JWT_SECRET_KEY:', 'JWT_SECRET_KEY' in a['environment']\); print\('agent volumes:', a.get\('volumes'\)\); print\('agent OLLAMA:', 'OLLAMA_BASE_URL' in a['environment']\)")

Bash(python3 -m py_compile acap_backend/services/projects/*.py acap_backend/services/projects/core/*.py acap_backend/services/projects/models/*.py acap_backend/services/projects/schemas/*.py acap_backend/services/projects/routers/*.py acap_backend/services/projects/services/*.py acap_backend/services/files/*.py acap_backend/services/files/core/*.py acap_backend/services/files/schemas/*.py acap_backend/services/files/routers/*.py acap_backend/services/files/services/*.py)
